case_title: ISHAM, MOLLY H.DBA MOLLY ISHAM & ASSOCIATES VS CHEN, CHRISTINA DBA CHEN,CHEW & ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,181.00 FILED BY ISHAM, MOLLY H.DBA MOLLY ISHAM & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, CHRISTINA DBA CHEN,CHEW & ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISHAM, MOLLY H.DBA MOLLY ISHAM & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, CHRISTINA DBA CHEN,CHEW & ASSOCIATES $1,181.00 PRINCIPAL, $146.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,327.40, INCLUDING $96.40 WITNESS FEES. SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-24-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-11-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
INVALID POS ON CHRISTINA CHEN. MAILING DONE BEFORE FILING OF CLAIM.
